sections.paragraph:
- Original: πιότης

- Transliteration: Piotes

- Phonetic: pee-ot'-ace

- Definition:

1. fatness

- Origin: from pion (fat, perhaps akin to the alternate of G4095 through the idea of repletion)

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine

- Strong's: From πίων piō n (fat; perhaps akin to the alternate of G4095 through the idea of repletion); plumpness that is (by implication) richness (oiliness): - fatness.
